deep.title: COLLEAGUE.SKILL: Automated AI Skill Generation via Expert Knowledge Distillation
deep.one_line: 通过专家知识蒸馏自动化生成AI技能，将异构痕迹转化为可检查的技能包

deep.title: Domino: Decoupling Causal Modeling from Autoregressive Drafting in Speculative Decoding
deep.one_line: 解耦因果建模与自回归草稿，提升投机解码速度

deep.title: A Matter of TASTE: Improving Coverage and Difficulty of Agent Benchmarks
deep.one_line: 从工具序列演化自动生成更难更广泛的agent基准，改进评测覆盖。

radar.title: Masking Stale Observations Helps Search Agents -- Until It Doesn't: A Regime Map and Its Mechanism
radar.one_line: 观察遮蔽对搜索代理性能影响的规律与机制

radar.title: On the Scaling of PEFT: Towards Million Personal Models of Trillion Parameters
radar.one_line: 将PEFT从廉价微调重新定位为持久局部状态，用于百万个性化模型

radar.title: Cosmos 3: Omnimodal World Models for Physical AI
radar.one_line: 统一多模态世界模型的架构设计方法

radar.title: GrepSeek: Training Search Agents for Direct Corpus Interaction
radar.one_line: 训练搜索agent通过shell命令直接与语料库交互，替代传统检索器

radar.title: Mellum2 Technical Report
radar.one_line: 开源了专精软件工程的MoE模型，展示了高效架构和agentic编码能力。

radar.title: Audio Interaction Model
radar.one_line: 提出在线统一音频交互模型，实时感知-决策-响应，对多模态agent有启发。

radar.title: KVarN: Variance-Normalized KV-Cache Quantization Mitigates Error Accumulation in Reasoning Tasks
radar.one_line: 提出了校准-free的KV-cache量化方法，缓解推理误差累积，适用长序列。

radar.title: OCC-RAG: Optimal Cognitive Core for Faithful Question Answering
radar.one_line: 用小模型结合检索实现忠实问答，强调推理而非参数知识。

radar.title: Trust-Region Behavior Blending for On-Policy Distillation
radar.one_line: 用信任区域行为混合改进在线蒸馏，提升学生早期训练质量。

radar.title: Representation Forcing for Bottleneck-Free Unified Multimodal Models
radar.one_line: 消除多模态模型瓶颈的表示强制训练技术
